name: steadystate
description: Approve, decline, or inspect pending steadystate remediations

options.name: help
options.description: List the commands this listener accepts

options.name: pending
options.description: Show remediations awaiting approval, with their fingerprints

options.name: probe
options.description: Scan a named target now and post what's wrong (read-only)

options.name: target
options.description: The named target to scan (from the listener's targets file)

options.name: approve
options.description: Approve a pending remediation by fingerprint

options.name: fingerprint
options.description: The drift fingerprint shown on the alert

options.name: decline
options.description: Decline a pending remediation by fingerprint

options.name: fingerprint
options.description: The drift fingerprint shown on the alert
